text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The book "Multi-armed Bandit Allocation Indices" is a real, well-documented publication by J. C. Gittins, published by John Wiley & Sons in 1989. The automated checker's "author mismatch" flagging "P. W. Jones" is erroneous — every credible source (Wiley, Amazon, AbeBooks, SIAM Review, Blackwell's) confirms the author as J. C. Gittins, exactly matching the cited reference. The cited author, title, publisher, and year are all correct.
LINK: https://www.abebooks.com/9780471920595/Multi-Armed-Bandit-Allocation-Indices-Wiley-0471920592/plp
